title: erigeron allocotus
intro: Erigeron allocotus, commonly known as Allocutia, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to North America. The medicinal properties of Allocutia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of using Allocutia include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Allocutia often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as poultices or salves.
